title: astragalus pelecinus subsp. leiocarpus
intro: Astragalus pelecinus subsp. leiocarpus, also known as Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus pelecinus subsp. leiocarpus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and aiding in the prevention of various diseases. Astragalus is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
